fields.title: Rethink memory tool with project/global/user scopes
fields.description: Implement the memory tool redesign: replace the current two-bucket model with three scopes (project, global, user), return the full updated memory snapshot after add/update/remove operations, and surface the backing file path in the tool-facing specification/output so agents can see where each memory scope lives. Update storage, prompt injection, tests, and docs/tool descriptions accordingly.
fields.close_reason: Landed with passing extensions/tau gate, startup/runtime fix, updated tests, and extension reinstall.
